hero.title: TenBox
taglines: Hatch Cyber Lobsters in One Click
Give Your AI a Safe Shell
An Army of Claws at Your Command
No Ocean Needed, Just a Box
Farm Local, Keep Your Data Home
hero.description: Create Agent VM instances with one click. Supports OpenClaw, CoPaw and other popular AI Agent projects. Simple GUI, no complex setup required.

oneclick.title: One-Click Agent VM
oneclick.desc: Supports OpenClaw, CoPaw and other popular AI Agent projects. Pick an image and create a VM instance instantly.

gui.title: Graphical Interface
gui.desc: Intuitive GUI — no command line needed, no complex installation process to learn.

security.title: Secure Isolation
security.desc: VM isolation ensures Agent exclusivity. Grant access only to authorized files, keeping your data safe.

native.title: Native Virtualization
native.desc: Built on Windows Hypervisor Platform (WHVP) with hardware-accelerated virtualization for excellent performance.

virtio.title: High-Performance VirtIO
virtio.desc: Display output, audio playback, shared folders, and bidirectional clipboard — a seamless experience.

network.title: Networking
network.desc: Built-in NAT networking, DHCP server, and port forwarding — works out of the box.

step1.title: Download & Install
step1.desc: Download the TenBox installer and install it on your Windows system.

step2.title: Create an Agent VM
step2.desc: Pick an Agent image (OpenClaw / CoPaw), create a VM with one click.

step3.title: Start Using
step3.desc: The VM starts automatically — use your Agent right from the graphical interface.
